author: y4rr
content:
Both audit findings fixed and shipped in commit c43abd37c.

A. cross(): rewrote to honor dim. New impl walks the non-axis dimensions in row-major order, lifts each length-3 column along the chosen axis, and applies the standard c[i] = a[(i+1)%3]*b[(i+2)%3] - a[(i+2)%3]*b[(i+1)%3] formula. Supports negative dim, validates shape parity, and enforces axis size == 3. The discriminating fixture (a [3,3], b [3,3], dim=0 vs dim=-1) now produces:
- dim=-1: [-10, 20, -10, -10, 20, -10, -10, 20, -10]
- dim=0:  [-30, -30, -30, 60, 60, 60, -30, -30, -30]
Verified bit-exact against torch.linalg.cross() for both axis choices.

B. full_meta(): rewrote to record value as Option<T> inside the Meta storage variant. Added TensorStorage::meta_filled / meta_fill_value plus the Tensor::meta_fill_value convenience accessor. Meta tensors still allocate zero element-wise data — the fill is metadata only — but it round-trips so full_meta(shape, 2.5).meta_fill_value() == Some(&2.5) and full_meta(shape, 0.0).meta_fill_value() == Some(&0.0) and zeros_meta(shape).meta_fill_value() == None. try_clone now preserves the recorded fill. _value renamed to value (param rename only — public signature unchanged). Public StorageBuffer::Meta variant's anonymous field renamed _phantom -> fill_value with type Option<T> (the variant is non-exhaustively matched everywhere in-crate, so this is the only edit needed).

Tests: 4 new tests (cross_dim_zero_vs_dim_last_differ, cross_dim_out_of_range_errors, cross_dim_size_must_be_three, full_meta_records_value_and_discriminates_by_fill); old alias-zeros_meta test renamed test_meta_constructors_share_shape_and_meta_flag with the alias assertion dropped (it would now lie).

Evidence:
- cargo test -p ferrotorch-core --lib: 1302/1302 pass (up from 1298, +4 new).
- cargo clippy -p ferrotorch-core --all-targets -- -D warnings: clean.
- Pre-existing conformance_surface_coverage failure on IndexSelectDimBackward / RollBackward is orthogonal — those items date to #1098 and #1014 and were unmodified by this work.

Note: commit c43abd37c also picked up pre-staged but uncommitted changes from #1108 (ferrotorch-train checkpoint_sequential, CHANGELOG entry). Those were in the index when I added my four ferrotorch-core files. Not destroying the commit since that requires explicit user authorization; flagging here for the audit trail.
